text: <par>Apparently all that is left of <xref ref="2012">#2012</xref> in this form is the rhotic prefix!</par>
<par>This form has perhaps been mis-glossed, in view of the fact that this morpheme means 'joint' in the other rGyalrong forms. </par>
<par>Or 293? (tsu); division? or not? Any relsp. 293/458? Cf. p. 43 etc.; for <latinform>r</latinform> cf. p. 23.</par>
<par>M1 NEST?? or cf. <latinform>dʑey</latinform> above. M2 = 227 cf. #14128 p. 31 end.</par>
